title: M.A Jobs 2026 – Senior Research Assistant
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Senior Research Assistant. Candidates Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 31-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IIM Lucknow official website.

basic_details.job_title: IIM Lucknow Senior Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Senior Research Assistant. Candidates Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 31-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IIM Lucknow official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-graduate in Economics/ Social Sciences from a reputed institute/ university in a regular mode with minimum 60% marks, Two (2) years relevant experience in FPOs/ cooperatives ecosystem
qualification.details: Post-graduate in Economics/ Social Sciences from a reputed institute/ university in a regular mode with minimum 60% marks. Two (2) years relevant experience in FPOs/ cooperatives ecosystem.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the IIM Lucknow Senior Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your CV via email for the Senior Research Assistant position at IIM Lucknow is 31st May 2026.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Post-graduate degree in Economics or Social Sciences with at least 60% marks from a recognized university and two years of relevant experience.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 50,000 per month, plus HRA.

faq.question: How can I apply for the Senior Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete bio-data and required documents to the official email address before the deadline.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the Senior Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves CV submission via email, followed by shortlisting, and then a virtual or in-person interview.

faq.question: What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Senior Research Assistant at IIM Lucknow.

faq.question: What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job is offered on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Where is IIM Lucknow located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow is located in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 226013.

faq.question: What is the official website of IIM Lucknow?
faq.answer: The official website of Indian Institute of Management Lucknow is www.iiml.ac.in, where you can find more information.
